name: Leslie Jones
bio: Leslie Jones is an American stand-up comedian and actress known for her booming, high-energy delivery and unfiltered persona. She spent decades on the road before joining Saturday Night Live as a writer and cast member in 2014, then starred in the 2016 Ghostbusters reboot. She released the Netflix special Time Machine in 2020.

timeline.ev: Joins Saturday Night Live as writer and cast member
Stars as Patty Tolan in Ghostbusters

accolades: Two Primetime Emmy nominations for SNL
Audie Award for the Leslie F*cking Jones audiobook (2024)

bits.t: Has 50 More Years Of Fun Ahead
